rules: Headings (H1/H2): Playfair Display, tracking-tighter for impact. Max size text-6xl.
Body: Outfit, leading-relaxed for high readability.

layout_and_spacing.container: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-24.
layout_and_spacing.corners: Minimal rounding (rounded-none or rounded-sm) to keep the sharp, premium jewel/luxury look.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol Mode A (Tetris) for the Gallery and Services sections to introduce visual tension and asymmetry.

buttons.primary: Background: primary gold. Text: black. Hover: opacity-90, subtle scale-105, or shining effect.
buttons.secondary: Transparent with 1px solid gold border. Text: gold/black (depending on theme).

navigation.style: Sticky/fixed top header. Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 (Dark) or bg-white/70 (Light). 1px subtle bottom border.

booking_flow.style: Minimalist, flat calendar UI without heavy borders. Active selected dates/times should be highlighted in primary gold. Use Shadcn's Select, Calendar, and Dialog/Card components. Flow: Service -> Stylist -> Date/Time -> Confirm.

cards.style: Flat Solid with 1px gold-tinted borders. Soft inner glow on hover.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Parallax effect on hero and gallery images. Use Lenis for smooth scrolling.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Images scale up slightly (scale-105) inside containers with overflow-hidden.
motion_and_interactions.loader: Elegant fade-in loader with gold accents or minimal logo spin on initial load.
motion_and_interactions.floating_action: Animated WhatsApp button fixed at bottom-right.

hero_background.description: Abstract golden metallic curves on black background

salon_interior.description: Elegant hair salon interior with illuminated mirrors

barber_chairs.description: Luxurious chairs in a dimly lit salon

stylist_cutting.description: Close-up of hairstylist cutting wet hair

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a hybrid marketing/booking app using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI.
Implement 'Playfair Display' (serif) and 'Outfit' (sans) via Google Fonts or standard imports.
Build the booking system flow with Shadcn calendar and select components (Service -> Stylist -> Date/Time -> Confirm).
Ensure dark and light modes toggle correctly, with dark mode as default.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and form elements.
Implement scroll animations with framer-motion and smooth scrolling via lenis.
